type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: New for 2024: For arsenic only, waste rock was above 12 mg/kg for the metasediment removed at Point Lake Pit. Granite is the waste rock type at all other pits. Metasediment removal began in 2024 at Point Lake. NP:AP ratio >3  and sulphur content < 0.2% are below the thresholds, so only the arsenic component is reported per section 3.5.4 of the guide. Note that the metasediment is waste rock, and not sediment (per exclusion of unconsolidated materials) and comprises 99% of the waste rock at Point Lake Pit.
